name: geopolitics_search
description: Search geopolitics news articles and Pentagon open source data. Returns recent articles matching keywords, filtered by category or source type.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search keywords or phrase to find relevant geopolitical news articles

parameters.name: source_type
parameters.description: Filter by source type: 'news' for general news, 'pentagon' for DoD sources, 'all' for both

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

output.description: Search results with matching articles and metadata
